title: QBE launches QuickQuote workers’ comp platform
full_text:
QBE Insurance launched QuickQuote, a digital workers’ compensation platform designed to help brokers quote, bind, and issue policies for small and medium-sized businesses more quickly. The platform offers a straight-through quote-to-bind process for eligible policies, with policy documentation available within minutes.
Available via web and mobile, QuickQuote is aimed at high-volume smaller policies and is intended to reduce manual follow-ups and streamline underwriting workflows.
QuickQuote became available to brokers nationally on April 30, 2026, for eligible SME workers’ compensation policies in Western Australia, the Australian Capital Territory, the Northern Territory, and Tasmania, with premiums under $50,000.
“QuickQuote is designed to cut through unnecessary complexity and speed up everyday quoting, so brokers can spend more time on driving better outcomes for their clients.” – Anthony D’Oca, General Manager of Commercial & People Risk at QBE Australia Pacific.
Coverager, Inc.

summary: QBE Insurance has launched QuickQuote, a new digital platform for brokers to quickly quote and issue workers' compensation policies for small and medium-sized businesses. The service became available on April 30, 2026, in several Australian regions for policies under $50,000.
author: Coverager
heading: General Insurance
key_points: QuickQuote aims to speed up the quoting process.
Available for small and medium-sized businesses.
ticker_line: QBE introduces QuickQuote for faster workers' comp quotes
